Environmental Protection.summary: Wicker has consistently opposed major environmental regulations and voted against climate legislation.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Wicker has a consistent anti-abortion voting record and has sponsored restrictive legislation.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act co-sponsor (2021)
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, May 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Wicker has voted against LGBTQ+ rights legislation.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Wicker has supported tax cuts and opposed progressive tax increases.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)
